rows.description: Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors. Clearly a header as visually verified.

rows.description: Gratuity to Jackson
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus across both extractors.

rows.description: File on Account pr Campfield
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between extractors. Description from `gpt-5-mini` ('File on Account pr Campfield') is visually more accurate, especially 'File' and 'pr', matching the handwriting better than 'Filer on Account of' from `gemini-flash`. `gpt-5-mini`'s note identified the ambiguity of 'File'.

rows.description: Mr Falconer for repairs of Bushey Tenements.
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Mr Falconer for repairs of Bushey Tenements.') is visually more complete, including the 's' in 'repairs' and 'Tenements', which are legible upon visual inspection.

rows.description: Mr Stringer for Receipt Stamps.
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Mr Stringer for Receipt Stamps.') is visually more accurate (includes 'Mr'). Both extractors correctly interpreted the 'c' symbol in the pounds column as zero.

rows.description: Subscription to new Chapel in St. Mary Magdn
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gpt-5-mini` ('Subscription to new Chapel in St. Mary Magdn') is more accurate, as its note correctly identified 'Magdn' as a common abbreviation for Magdalen, which is visually confirmed in the ledger.

rows.description: C. Pile, late College Groom. 5/- per week
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('C. Pile, late College Groom. 5/- per week') is visually more accurate for the initial, which appears as a 'C' with a flourish.

rows.description: Rent of &c from Mr having recd 10.0.0
rows.notes: Visually verified: The line is heavily struck through. Critically, there are no amounts in the dedicated monetary columns. The '10.0.0' is part of the description text, as correctly noted by `gemini-flash`. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly extracted amounts from the description area. `gemini-flash`'s description is more accurate.

rows.description: Receipt Stamps.
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus across both extractors.

rows.description: Mr Hastings on acct of work at Campfield
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gpt-5-mini` ('Mr Hastings on acct of work at Campfield') is visually more accurate, as its note correctly identified 'acct' as an abbreviation for 'Account'.

rows.description: Poor of South Newington for Coal
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus across both extractors.

rows.description: Repairing pumps &c at Merton
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description 'Repairing pumps &c at Merton' is visually more accurate, combining 'pumps' (from `gpt-5-mini`) and 'Merton' (from `gemini-flash` and visually confirmed, correcting `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Sherton').

rows.description: Timber for Lime
rows.notes: Visually verified: Description is clearly 'Timber for Lime'. Amounts are 'c' (0 pounds), 1 shilling, 4 pence. `gemini-flash` correctly extracted both the description and the monetary values, while `gpt-5-mini` was inaccurate on both.

rows.description: Mr Glubb, Discard 2 2nd Agency
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Mr Glubb, Discard 2 2nd Agency') is visually more accurate, as confirmed by visual inspection. Both extractors correctly noted difficulty in reading parts of the description.

rows.description: Sandell, one day's Work at Rectory, Hillingdon
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description combines best readings: 'Sandell' (from `gpt-5-mini`) and 'Hillingdon' (from `gemini-flash`) are visually more accurate upon inspection.

rows.description: Provisional Stipend Mr Hussey to Xmas
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Provisional Stipend Mr Hussey to Xmas') is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s reading, which misread 'Stipend' and the surname.

rows.description: Grendelton Chancel
rows.notes: Visually verified: Amounts are 'c' (0 pounds), 9 shillings, 0 pence. `gemini-flash` is correct for amounts. Description 'Grendelton Chancel' is also more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Kidlington Chancel', particularly the initial 'G'.

rows.description: Case for Packing Glass for Do
rows.notes: Description is consistent. Visually verified: Amounts are 0 pounds, 2 shillings, 6 pence. `gemini-flash` correctly extracted the monetary values, while `gpt-5-mini` misread the shillings amount as 7.

rows.description: Davies, mounting Almanack for Lord Petre
rows.notes: Visually verified: Amounts are 'c' (0 pounds), 10 shillings, 0 pence. `gemini-flash` correctly extracted the monetary values. Description uses 'Davies, mounting Almanack for Lord Petre', drawing on `gpt-5-mini` for the 'Davies' and 'Almanack' spellings which are visually more accurate.

rows.description: Property Tax - 1st half-year
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus across both extractors. Minor difference in description hyphenation; `gemini-flash`'s 'half-year' hyphenation is chosen as it matches the handwriting style.

rows.description: Gas Company
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus across both extractors.

rows.description: Subscription to Carfas Church
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Subscription to Carfas Church') is visually more accurate; while ambiguous, 'Carfas' is a plausible reading, contrasting with `gpt-5-mini`'s generic 'Church name faint'.

rows.description: Mr Litterbuck for repairs of Cottages at d. Whiten
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Mr Litterbuck for repairs of Cottages at d. Whiten') is visually more accurate, particularly the surname and initial of the place name, as confirmed by visual inspection.

rows.description: Purchase Money of the Fee in reversion of the new buildings in Broad St.
rows.notes: Visually verified: This is a single entry with a braced, multi-line description and a single amount. `gpt-5-mini`'s structural interpretation (one row for the entire braced entry) is correct, while `gemini-flash` incorrectly split it into two rows. The description 'Purchase Money of the Fee in reversion of the new buildings in Broad St.' and amounts (2100, 0, 0) are extracted from `gpt-5-mini`, which also more accurately reads 'Fee' instead of 'See'.

rows.description: Mr Hester (the Town Clerk's) bill in the matter
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Mr Hester (the Town Clerk's) bill in the matter') is visually more accurate, explicitly including the parentheses around 'the Town Clerk's' that are visible in the ledger.

rows.description: Two Thirds of Mr Driver's bill for valuing the same
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Two Thirds of Mr Driver's bill for valuing the same') is visually more accurate, including the capital 'T' in 'Thirds' and the name 'Driver', as confirmed by visual inspection.

rows.description: Loan to the Rector - 1/2 of third instalment for improvements at Shadfield
rows.notes: Visually verified: This is a single entry with a braced, multi-line description and a single amount. `gpt-5-mini`'s structural interpretation (one row for the entire braced entry) is correct, while `gemini-flash` incorrectly split it into two rows. The combined description 'Loan to the Rector - 1/2 of third instalment for improvements at Shadfield' (using 'Shadfield' from `gemini-flash` as visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Stratfield') and amounts (50, 0, 0) are used.

Amounts are consistent. Visually verified that there is no 'TOTAL' text label present on this line in the ledger, only the summed figures. `gpt-5-mini`'s description (empty string) is accurate in this regard, while `gemini-flash` incorrectly added 'TOTAL'.
